---
title: "Violence and Female Representation in Movies"
author: "Esther Lim, Ethan Sanders, Kamila Kwiatkowska"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)

film_data <- read.csv("data/violence-bechdel-data.csv")

```

# Final Project Analysis

R Project and Markdown document set up
